title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 472.025 - State may be party to proceedings — service
text:
472.025.  State may be party to proceedings — service. — Proceedings may be conducted under section 473.083 or any other section of chapters 472 and 473 when the state of Missouri or any department or agency thereof is a necessary or proper party defendant or interested therein, directly or indirectly, as devisee, claimant by way of escheat, claimant as creditor, or otherwise.  Service of process and notices upon the state of Missouri or any department or agency thereof may be made by delivery to the prosecuting attorney of the county.
(L. 1967 p. 639 § 1, A.L. 1980 S.B. 637) 
Effective 1-01-81
